verdict: The UFO 2 combines thermal heating with sonic vibration to enhance mask efficacy, though results depend entirely on paired products used. Its smart technology integration elevates the experience but doesn't introduce novel skincare compounds.

_research.name: FOREO UFO 2 Smart Mask Device
pros: Syncs with app for personalized routines
_research.con: Requires compatible masks and serums to deliver results, adding ongoing product costs.
